name: TC-TXN-007 — Detail for ID: 2e8b4ea3-5413-4428-bc49-25de24680cdb
description:
Verifies the GET /transaction/:id endpoint for a known UUID.

**Endpoint:** GET /api/v1/transaction/2e8b4ea3-5413-4428-bc49-25de24680cdb
**Expected:** HTTP 200 with full transaction detail including payment_trnx_id, transaction_confirmation_id, payment_reference, payment_method, gateway_status, trnx_date, payer_name, payer_phone, payer_email, and financial amounts.

Note: The API accepts a UUID as path param but returns its own reference IDs in the body.
